requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC — Bolivia Network-Readiness
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与EMC——玻利维亚网络就绪性
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與EMC——玻利維亞網絡就緒性

summary.en: Bolivia does not yet have a national public EV charging network management platform equivalent to Kahramaa's Tarsheed (Qatar) or ANEEL's interoperability framework (Brazil) as of 2026-06-14. However, for any networked EV charger deployed for commercial, fleet, or public use in Bolivia, OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is the de-facto international standard for back-office communication between chargers and charge-point management systems, and is referenced in IEC 63584. Any operator or project owner in Bolivia deploying a managed charging network will most likely specify OCPP as the communication protocol requirement, consistent with global IEC-aligned practice. EMC requirements applicable to EV chargers in Bolivia follow the IEC 61000 series, adopted by IBNORCA as NB norms where available. A formal published Bolivia EMC regulation specifically for EV chargers has not been confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，玻利维亚尚未建立相当于卡塔尔卡赫拉马Tarsheed或巴西ANEEL互操作框架的国家公共电动汽车充电网络管理平台。然而，对于在玻利维亚部署的任何用于商业、车队或公共用途的联网电动汽车充电桩，OCPP（开放充电点协议）是充电桩与充电点管理系统之间后台通信的事实国际标准，并在IEC 63584中被引用。玻利维亚部署托管充电网络的任何运营商或项目业主最有可能将OCPP指定为通信协议要求，与全球IEC体系实践一致。玻利维亚电动汽车充电桩适用的EMC要求遵循IEC 61000系列，由IBNORCA在有条件时作为NB规范采用。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认专门针对电动汽车充电桩的正式成文玻利维亚EMC法规。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，玻利維亞尚未建立相當於卡塔爾卡赫拉馬Tarsheed或巴西ANEEL互操作框架的國家公共電動汽車充電網絡管理平台。然而，對於在玻利維亞部署的任何用於商業、車隊或公共用途的聯網電動汽車充電樁，OCPP（開放充電點協議）是充電樁與充電點管理系統之間後台通訊的事實國際標準，並在IEC 63584中被引用。玻利維亞部署托管充電網絡的任何運營商或項目業主最有可能將OCPP指定為通訊協議要求，與全球IEC體系實踐一致。玻利維亞電動汽車充電樁適用的EMC要求遵循IEC 61000系列，由IBNORCA在有條件時作為NB規範採用。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認專門針對電動汽車充電樁的正式成文玻利維亞EMC法規。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers (de-facto international standard)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IBNORCA NB adoptions of IEC 61000 EMC standards — verify current adopted editions
AE technical norms for electrical installations

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator. For EMC, China chargers are tested to GB/T standards aligned with but not identical to IEC 61000 series requirements; GB/T EMC evidence may support an engineering review but does not substitute for IEC 61000 accredited test evidence required in an IEC-aligned market.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议。在EMC方面，中国充电桩依据与IEC 61000系列对应但不完全相同的GB/T标准进行测试；GB/T EMC证据可在工程审查中提供参考，但不能替代IEC体系市场所要求的IEC 61000认可测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議。在EMC方面，中國充電樁依據與IEC 61000系列對應但不完全相同的GB/T標準進行測試；GB/T EMC證據可在工程審查中提供參考，但不能替代IEC體系市場所要求的IEC 61000認可測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China GB/T EMC standards aligned with IEC 61000 series

gap.en: Exporters deploying networked chargers in Bolivia should: (1) confirm the charger firmware supports OCPP (version to be confirmed with the project operator or fleet owner — OCPP 1.6J and 2.0.1 are in common use); (2) replace GB/T 27930 DC communication with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for DC stations; (3) obtain IEC 61000-series accredited EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, since Bolivia IBNORCA NB adoptions follow IEC 61000 and GB/T EMC reports are not a direct substitute; (4) confirm with AE and IBNORCA whether a formal EMC approval route or type-approval process is currently required for EV chargers in Bolivia. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation cannot be integrated into any professionally managed Bolivia charging network.
gap.zh: 在玻利维亚部署联网充电桩的出口商应：(1) 确认充电桩固件支持OCPP（版本须与项目运营商或车队业主确认——OCPP 1.6J和2.0.1是常用版本）；(2) 将直流充电站的GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 61000系列认可EMC测试报告，因为玻利维亚IBNORCA NB采标遵循IEC 61000，GB/T EMC报告不是直接替代；(4) 向AE和IBNORCA确认玻利维亚目前是否要求电动汽车充电桩经过正式EMC审批路径或型式认可流程。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩，无法集成到任何专业管理的玻利维亚充电网络中。
gap.zht: 在玻利維亞部署聯網充電樁的出口商應：(1) 確認充電樁固件支持OCPP（版本須與項目運營商或車隊業主確認——OCPP 1.6J和2.0.1是常用版本）；(2) 將直流充電站的GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 61000系列認可EMC測試報告，因為玻利維亞IBNORCA NB採標遵循IEC 61000，GB/T EMC報告不是直接替代；(4) 向AE和IBNORCA確認玻利維亞目前是否要求電動汽車充電樁經過正式EMC審批路徑或型式認可流程。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁，無法集成到任何專業管理的玻利維亞充電網絡中。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: De-facto for any networked charger deployment — no single Bolivia-wide mandatory OCPP platform requirement confirmed as of 2026-06-14; verify with project operator and AE. EMC: IEC 61000 series applies via IBNORCA NB adoptions; formal EV-specific EMC approval route not confirmed — verify with AE/IBNORCA
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for OCPP back-office integration; GB/T EMC evidence is not a direct substitute for IEC 61000 accredited test reports in an IEC-aligned market

source.publisher: IBNORCA — Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bolivia has no confirmed national OCPP mandate or EV charging network platform as of 2026-06-14 — but any commercially managed Bolivia charger network will expect OCPP. GB/T 27930 DC communication must be replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for DC deployments. IEC 61000 series EMC evidence is required; GB/T EMC reports are not a direct substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月14日，玻利维亚尚无经确认的国家OCPP授权令或电动汽车充电网络平台——但任何商业管理的玻利维亚充电网络都会要求OCPP。直流部署须将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。须提供IEC 61000系列EMC证据；GB/T EMC报告不是直接替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月14日，玻利維亞尚無經確認的國家OCPP授權令或電動汽車充電網絡平台——但任何商業管理的玻利維亞充電網絡都會要求OCPP。直流部署須將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。須提供IEC 61000系列EMC證據；GB/T EMC報告不是直接替代。
